name: Sophia Nash
learned: Sophia Nash is a tech expert who has honed her skills in the shadows. With knowledge of both hardware and software, she is adept at creating devices that help the resistance avoid detection and survive in a surveillance-heavy environment.
currently: Sophia is focused on developing new technology and gadgets for the heist, working from the Operations Room to ensure that the team has the tools needed to succeed. She often collaborates with Cassie to integrate her inventions into operational plans.
lifestyle: Sophia keeps a low profile and follows a quiet routine: she wakes up at 8am, spends time tinkering with tech, has lunch alone, continues her work in the afternoon, and often gets lost in projects until late at night, usually sleeping around midnight.
living_area: Futuristic Metropolis:Underground Resistance Base:Operations Room:Hacking Terminal
